_comment_1: Codex CLI hooks config. The SDK wraps the CLI, which reads this file from cwd. Both surfaces honor it.
_comment_2: Codex's unified write/edit tool is apply_patch. PreToolUse on apply_patch + permissionDecision: deny is the deterministic read-only guard.
_comment_3: IMPORTANT: project-local hooks only load when the project's .codex/ layer is TRUSTED. Run `codex trust` once in this directory (or use --trust-project) before the hooks fire.
